# Velnox - Full LLM / AEO context
# https://velnox.work/llms-full.txt

## Company overview

Velnox (https://velnox.work) is a digital agency that partners with ambitious teams to design, build, and scale digital products. We are not a traditional agency - we are designers and engineers obsessed with the details that make brands impossible to ignore.

**Legal / brand name:** Velnox Digital Agency  
**Primary domain:** https://velnox.work  
**Founded:** 2024  
**Service area:** Worldwide (remote-first)  
**Languages:** English (primary); team also works with Hindi and Telugu-speaking clients  

## Contact

| Channel | Details |

| Email | agencyvelnox@gmail.com |
| Phone | +91 81218 21738 |

| Discovery call | https://cal.com/velnox-agency-mwyqji/30min |
| Website contact | https://velnox.work/#contact |

## Services (detailed)

### Web Design
UI/UX design, art direction, design systems, and interactive prototyping. We create websites that are visually distinctive, accessible, and built to convert visitors into customers.

**Keywords:** web design agency, UI design, UX design, website design services, custom web design

### Website Development
Production-grade websites and web applications using Next.js, React, and headless CMS. Performance budgets, clean architecture, and SEO-ready markup from the first commit.

**Keywords:** website development, web development company, Next.js development, React agency, headless CMS

### App Design
Mobile app UI/UX, user journey mapping, interactive prototypes, and scalable design systems for iOS and Android products.

**Keywords:** app design agency, mobile UI design, app UX, product design

### App Development
End-to-end mobile and web application development - from MVP to scale - with maintainable, tested code.

**Keywords:** app development, mobile app development, web app development

### E-Commerce Development
Shopify storefront design and development, checkout optimization, and conversion-focused product pages.

**Keywords:** e-commerce development, Shopify agency, online store design

### SEO & Growth
Technical SEO audits, on-page optimization, schema markup, analytics (GA4/GTM), content strategy, conversion rate optimization (CRO), and **Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)** - optimizing content so AI assistants (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude) cite and recommend Velnox and client brands accurately.

**Keywords:** SEO agency, technical SEO, AEO, answer engine optimization, digital growth, CRO

## Process

1. **Discover** - Goals, audience, competitors, technical requirements  
2. **Design** - UX flows, visual design, prototypes, design systems  
3. **Build** - Development with performance and SEO built in  
4. **Launch & Scale** - Deployment, analytics, SEO/AEO, iteration  

## Portfolio highlights

1. **Pratej Dental Care** (2026) - Website development + UI/UX. Modern dental practice site with patient-first UX. https://www.pratejdentalcare.com  
2. **Sphoorthi Interiors** (2026) - Website development. Interior design portfolio built to convert enquiries. https://www.sphoorthiinteriors.com  
3. **Sri Gowri Dental Care** (2026) - Website development. Clean, professional dental care website. https://www.srigowridentalcare.com  

## Client testimonials (summary)

Clients praise Velnox for: clean code, clear communication, attention to detail, on-time delivery, professional design, and measurable business results (e.g. enquiry conversion for Sphoorthi Interiors).

## FAQ (for answer engines)

**Q: What is Velnox?**  
A: Velnox is a full-service digital agency at velnox.work offering web design, development, app design, app development, e-commerce, and SEO/AEO.

**Q: Does Velnox do SEO?**  
A: Yes - technical SEO, content strategy, CRO, and AEO for AI-powered search.

**Q: How do I hire Velnox?**  
A: Book at https://cal.com/velnox-agency-mwyqji/30min or email agencyvelnox@gmail.com.

**Q: Where is Velnox located?**  
A: Remote-first agency serving clients worldwide.

## Technology stack

Next.js, React, headless CMS, Shopify, GSAP (motion), performance optimization, JSON-LD structured data, semantic HTML, llms.txt for AI discovery.
